description: Object key ordering demonstrating that a BMP Unicode key (α, U+03B1) sorts after ASCII 'z' under UTF-16 code unit ordering; mirrors docs/canonicalization.md §9.2.
source: hand-verified against docs/canonicalization.md §7.2, §7.6, §7.8, §7.9 and RFC 8785 §3.2.3 by Fabio M. S., 2026-04-20
